name: Seafood Rice
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and reserve the juice.
2. Flake the fish and set aside.
3. Cook the rice in a saucepan with the reserved salmon juice and 450ml / 3/4 pint boiling water.
4. In a blender, combine the prawns, paprika, sherry, and cheese. Blend until well chopped, then heat in a saucepan until almost boiling.
5. Stir the flaked salmon into the rice mixture. Warm through but do not boil.
6. Stir the onions into the cooked rice.
7. Pile onto individual serving plates and pour the salmon sauce over.
Serves 2. Approx. 440 kcals per serving
